ddls:
CREATE TABLE "beats" (
  "beat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each beat */,
  "beat_name" TEXT /* Name of the beat */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the beat's coverage area */,
  "area" REAL /* Size of the beat area in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the beat area */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the beat area */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_types" (
  "crime_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of crime */,
  "crime_name" TEXT /* Name of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the crime */,
  "legal_consequences" TEXT /* Typical legal consequences for the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crime_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "npu" TEXT /* Neighborhood Planning Unit (NPU) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the neighborhood */,
  "crime_rate" REAL /* Average crime rate in the neighborhood */,
  "demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shifts" (
  "shift_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shift */,
  "shift_name" TEXT /* Name of the shift */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the shift */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the shift */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the shift's responsibilities */,
  "officer_count" INTEGER /* Number of officers assigned to the shift */,
  "shift_supervisor" INTEGER /* ID of the shift supervisor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shift_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ucr_codes" (
  "ucr_number" INTEGER /* UCR number associated with the crime */,
  "ucr_literal" TEXT /* UCR literal description of the crime */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the crime */,
  "legal_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the legal statute */,
  "penalty" TEXT /* Typical penalty for the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ucr_number")
)

CREATE TABLE "ibr_codes" (
  "ibr_code" INTEGER /* IBR code for the incident */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident category */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the incident */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact on the community */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ibr_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "beat_id" INTEGER /* Beat identifier the user is assigned to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Access level of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_beat_id FOREIGN KEY ("beat_id") REFERENCES beats ("beat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who filed the report */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Details of the incident report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the incident report document */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report */,
  "reported_by" TEXT /* Name of the person who reported the incident */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the person who reported the incident */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Description of the action taken */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the action was taken */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_details" TEXT /* Details of the analysis performed */,
  "conclusion" TEXT /* Conclusion drawn from the analysis */,
  "analysis_status" TEXT /* Status of the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_analysis_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resource_allocations" (
  "allocation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resource allocation */,
  "beat_id" INTEGER /* ID of the beat where resources are allocated */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of resource allocated */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of resources allocated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the allocation */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the allocation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the resource allocation */,
  "officer_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the officers assigned to the resource allocation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("allocation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_resource_allocations_beat_id FOREIGN KEY ("beat_id") REFERENCES beats ("beat_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the alert */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message contained in the alert */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
